changes.summary: Added ProposeDocumentVariantUseCase (BC-06): propose orchestration with documentsMode/permission gates, wave pre-finalize, variantCost quota/wallet pre-checks and debits (inv-01 via GLOBAL_COMMUNITY_ID), variant persistence, and proposal notifications. createProposeDocumentVariantUseCase factory.

Added FinalizeDocumentWaveUseCase (BC-06): periodic sweep (execute), per-block finalize with distributed lock, winner selection, wave reset, notifications, and autoApplyWinner callback. createFinalizeDocumentWaveUseCase factory.

Wired use cases in constructor. proposeVariant, runPeriodicWaveSweep, and finalizeExpiredWaveOnBlock delegate to use cases. Removed inlined propose/finalize/sweep logic and proposal fee helpers. tryAutoApplyWinner + applyVariantToOfficial retained for inv-15 mirrorOfficialTextToCommunityIfApplicable (PublicationService OB sync).

notes: documentVariants.propose and document-wave cron still enter via DocumentVariantService (out of write_set); service now delegates to use cases. document-variants.router direct UC wiring deferred to follow-up. Auto-apply after wave finalize still routes through DocumentVariantService.applyVariantToOfficial → documentService.mirrorOfficialTextToCommunityIfApplicable for inv-15.
